# Indian Foodtech

> B2B peanut butter manufacturer and exporter based in Surat, Gujarat, India. Daily production: 3,000 kg. Exports to 47 countries. Certifications: FSSAI, Halal, ISO.

Indian Foodtech is a certified peanut butter and nut butter manufacturer serving importers, distributors, retail brands, and supermarket chains worldwide. We offer private label manufacturing, custom formulations, and bulk export from India.

## Company Facts

- Location: Surat, Gujarat, India (ships via Mundra Port & JNPT/Nhava Sheva)
- Daily production: 3,000 kg of peanut butter and nut butters
- Export markets: 47 countries across Europe, Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa, and the Americas
- Certifications: FSSAI, Jamiyat Halal, Halal, ISO, Non-GMO Project Verified, Keto Certified, Gluten Free
- Minimum order quantity: One 20-foot container (~15,000–18,000 kg); pallet-level MOQ available for private label pilots
- Lead time: 2–3 weeks (repeat orders); 4–6 weeks (new private label projects)
- Contact: office@indianfoodtech.in | sales@indianfoodtech.in | +91 97148 99711

## Products

### Peanut Butter (10 varieties)
- Natural Creamy Peanut Butter — 100% roasted peanuts, no sugar, no preservatives
- Natural Crunchy Peanut Butter — 100% roasted peanuts, no sugar, no preservatives
- Classic Creamy Peanut Butter — roasted peanuts, sugar, salt, stabilizer
- Classic Crunchy Peanut Butter — roasted peanuts, sugar, salt, stabilizer
- Chocolate Creamy Peanut Butter — organic peanuts, honey, cocoa
- Chocolate Crunchy Peanut Butter — organic peanuts, honey, cocoa
- Elaichi (Cardamom) Creamy Peanut Butter — cardamom-infused, Indian-flavored
- Elaichi (Cardamom) Crunchy Peanut Butter — cardamom-infused, Indian-flavored
- Natural Creamy Peanut Butter Sugar Free — 98% roasted peanuts, zero added sugar
- Natural Crunchy Peanut Butter Sugar Free — 98% roasted peanuts, zero added sugar

### Nut Butters
- Almond Butter — 100% roasted California almonds
- Cashew Butter — 100% roasted premium cashews
- Tahini (Sesame Paste) — 100% roasted premium hulled sesame

### Other Products
- Roasted Peanut Dices — for bakery, confectionery, snacks, and toppings
- Hazelnut Chocolate Spread — hazelnut (10%), cocoa (10%), premium ingredients

## Packaging Sizes

Retail: 227g, 250g, 340g, 350g, 400g, 500g, 510g, 1 kg
Industrial: 20 kg food-grade pails, 235 kg HDPE drums
Container optimization: 20-foot and 40-foot shipping containers

## Services

- Private Label Manufacturing — custom formulation, branded packaging design, label printing, destination-market labeling compliance, full export documentation under your brand
- Bulk Export — Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Phytosanitary Certificate, Health Certificate, Aflatoxin Lab Reports, Halal Certificate
- Custom Formulations — roast profiles, sweetness, viscosity, texture, EU/FDA aflatoxin-controlled specifications

## Export Markets & Country Pages

Indian Foodtech has dedicated pages for each country it exports to, covering bulk import, private label, and supplier services.

### Europe (Peanut Butter Importer pages)
Germany, France, United Kingdom, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Switzerland, Denmark, Finland, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Luxembourg, Malta, Norway, Czech Republic, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Slovenia, Montenegro, Kosovo, Ukraine, Vatican City

### Europe (Peanut Butter Supplier pages)
Netherlands, Belgium, Austria, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Bulgaria, Croatia, Serbia, Slovakia, Albania, Andorra, Belarus, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Cyprus, Moldova, Monaco, North Macedonia, San Marino, Russia

### Middle East & GCC
United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait
(Halal-certified; Arabic label compliance and GCC customs documentation available)

### Asia
China, Japan, South Korea, India, Indonesia, Thailand, Malaysia, Vietnam, Singapore, Philippines

### Africa
South Africa, Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, Egypt, Ethiopia, Tanzania, Botswana

### Americas
United States, Canada, Brazil, Argentina, Chile, Colombia, Mexico

### Oceania
Australia, New Zealand
